title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
